_doc: biology axis sub-SSOT — parent: ../_index.json (biology key). Created 2026-04-28 to host the hexa-weave domain (write-side multi-strand molecular design composition) under a new top-level biology axis. 2026-04-28 cycle 13 fan-out 2/5: hexa-nanobot sister domain registered (single molecular nano-machine architecture; counterpart to hexa-weave multi-strand composition). 2026-04-28 cycle 15 fan-out 3/3: hexa-ribozyme third sister domain registered (catalytic RNA architecture; chemical-catalysis genus distinct from composition (hexa-weave) and actuation (hexa-nanobot)). 2026-04-28 cycle 19 fan-out 4/4: hexa-virocapsid fourth sister domain registered (viral capsid self-assembly architecture; non-covalent thermodynamic/kinetic genus distinct from composition (hexa-weave) / actuation (hexa-nanobot) / catalysis (hexa-ribozyme); biology-axis tetrahedron closed at 4 sisters). Distinct from the life axis (which carries clinical / agricultural / pharmacological / virological / vaccinological domains); biology axis is for fundamental molecular-design / write-side composition / nano-machine actuation / catalytic-RNA / capsid-self-assembly architecture systems.

_meta._category_name: molecular biology, write-side multi-strand design composition, proteome inverse-design, molecular nano-machine architecture, catalytic-RNA architecture, viral capsid self-assembly architecture
_meta._honesty_note: _verified_count / _alien_index_avg null on creation; populate from atlas.n6 aggregation once the first MVP runs land per F-TP5-b 90-day gate (hexa-weave deadline 2026-07-28), F-NB-4 90-day gate (hexa-nanobot deadline 2026-07-28), F-RB-4 90-day gate (hexa-ribozyme deadline 2026-07-28), and F-VIROCAPSID-3 90-day gate (hexa-virocapsid deadline 2026-07-28)

_changelog: 1.0.0 (2026-04-28): biology axis sub-SSOT created. hexa-weave registered (write-side multi-strand molecular design composition; counterpart to AlphaFold 3 read-side single-chain prediction; tri-axis Omega-saturation closure witness PASS at workload ceiling per design/kick/2026-04-28_hexa-weave-closure_omega_cycle.json; verdict tier APPROACH per raw 69 ceiling-classification; theoretical-analytical not yet empirical; F-TP5-b 90-day MVP gate 2026-07-28).

1.1.0 (2026-04-28): hexa-nanobot sister domain registered (single molecular nano-machine architecture; counterpart to hexa-weave multi-strand composition; n6 invariant projection tau(6)=4 motor states / sigma(6)=12 vertex / J_2=24 symmetry / phi(6)=2 binary actuator; verdict tier APPROACH per raw 69; theoretical-analytical not yet empirical; F-NB-4 90-day MVP gate 2026-07-28; 5 raw 71 falsifiers preregistered; witness design/kick/2026-04-28_hexa-nanobot-domain-registration_omega_cycle.json).

1.2.0 (2026-04-28): hexa-ribozyme third sister domain registered (catalytic RNA architecture; chemical-catalysis genus distinct from composition (hexa-weave) and actuation (hexa-nanobot); n6 invariant projection tau(6)=4 reaction states / sigma(6)=12 catalytic-core nucleotides / J_2=24 trigonal-bipyramidal TS pose-symmetry / phi(6)=2 binary cleavage outcome; verdict tier APPROACH per raw 69; theoretical-analytical not yet empirical; F-RB-4 90-day MVP gate 2026-07-28; 5 raw 71 falsifiers preregistered; cycle 15 fan-out 3/3; witness design/kick/2026-04-28_hexa-ribozyme-registration-cycle15_omega_cycle.json).

1.3.0 (2026-04-28): hexa-virocapsid fourth sister domain registered (viral capsid self-assembly architecture; non-covalent thermodynamic/kinetic genus distinct from composition (hexa-weave) and actuation (hexa-nanobot) and catalysis (hexa-ribozyme); biology-axis tetrahedron closed at 4 sisters; n6 invariant projection sigma(6)=12 T=1 icosahedral 12 vertex STRUCTURAL-EXACT (stronger than hexa-ribozyme STRUCTURAL-APPROXIMATE) / tau(6)=4 assembly states free-CP/pentamer/hexamer/capsid / J_2=24 octahedral subgroup of icosahedral I (order 60) via 5-inscribed-cube outer action / phi(6)=2 closed/open shell binary; verdict tier APPROACH per raw 69; theoretical-analytical not yet empirical; F-VIROCAPSID-3 90-day MVP gate 2026-07-28; 5 raw 71 falsifiers preregistered; cycle 19 fan-out 4/4; witness design/kick/2026-04-28_hexa-virocapsid-registration-cycle19_omega_cycle.json).

n6_invariant_mapping.sigma_6_eq_12: 12 conserved catalytic-core nucleotides (hammerhead minimal type-II+III ~13 nt / HDV antigenomic ~12 nt / hairpin A-loop+B-loop ~12 nt; approximate not exact across the corpus)
n6_invariant_mapping.J_2_eq_24: 24-element trigonal-bipyramidal phosphate transition-state pose-equivalence group (octahedral rotation group order 24)

domains.primary_constraint: diffusion-limit ceiling k_cat / K_M <= 10^8-10^9 M^-1 s^-1 (Eigen-Hammes 1963)

domains.biology_tetrahedron_role: fourth vertex; closes composition + actuation + catalysis + assembly tetrahedron

n6_invariant_mapping.sigma_6_eq_12: T=1 icosahedral capsid 12 vertex (STRUCTURAL-EXACT — stronger than hexa-ribozyme STRUCTURAL-APPROXIMATE; Caspar-Klug 1962 quasi-equivalence theory; T-number = h^2 + h*k + k^2; vertex count is topological invariant of the icosahedron at every T-number)
n6_invariant_mapping.tau_6_eq_4: 4 assembly states (free-CP / pentamer / hexamer / capsid; Zlotnick 2003 nucleation-elongation kinetic model)
n6_invariant_mapping.J_2_eq_24: octahedral group O (order 24) as natural subgroup of icosahedral group I (order 60) via 5-inscribed-cube outer action

domains.primary_constraint: kinetic-trap ceiling: aberrant-assembly fraction must remain below closed-shell yield (Zlotnick 2003 nucleation-elongation)

cross_links.life_soft_collision_documented: life/virology references icosahedral capsid T=3,13 Caspar-Klug as one-line summary; HEXA-VIROCAPSID provides the architectural primitives layer (vertex / assembly-path / pose-symmetry / closure-binary) absent from life/virology

raw_106_multi_realizability.counter_example_documented: helical TMV (rod-shape, not icosahedral) — explicitly preregistered as counter-class in F-VIROCAPSID-2
